nodes.title: Negative
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: redepthkontext change depth map to photo.

The image shows a cartoon character standing on a dirt path in a forest. The character is wearing a blue and orange helmet with a pair of goggles on top. The helmet has a red visor and a blue strap around the neck. The goggles have orange lenses and the character has green eyes and a small nose. They are also wearing a brown outfit with blue shorts and black boots. The background is filled with tall trees and green foliage. The sky is blue and the overall mood of the image is peaceful and serene.

nodes.title: Manual Prompt
widgets_values: A cartoon character standing on a dirt path in a magical forest. The character has green eyes and is wearing a blue and orange helmet with a pair of goggles on top. The helmet has a pointed nose and a small mouth with sharp teeth. The goggles have orange lenses and the character is also wearing a brown outfit with a belt and boots. The background is filled with tall trees and green foliage. The sunlight creates a bokeh effect. Best quality, masterpiece, extremely high detail, cinematic. ((3D animation style))
Create a 1-2 sentence description of the character. Start by establishing what the character is and focus on a physical description and outfit

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Place the subject in a magical forest that is in Pixar, 3d animated style. Maintain identical subject placement, camera angle, framing, and perspective.

nodes.title: PROMPT
widgets_values: masterpiece, best quality, pixar style, disney pixar, character sheet, a magical hero boy with caucasion skin tone and elf ears with dazzling sea blue eyes. He has dirty blond hair underneath a worn steampunk helmet with psychedelic reflective metal and glass goggles on top. He wears form-fitting worn leather armor. (character sheet, white background)
